TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1944 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Md. Abdul Hamid , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bangladesh anini i ci Md. Abdul Hamid, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 24 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i m…¨~…ģ. ab~b~v…¨~…ģo~u~u…ĺ ńßami…¨~…ģ , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vaŇč…ĺa…¨~…ģ…ôsńß anini i ¶i m…¨~…ģ. ab~b~v…¨~…ģo~u~u…ĺ ńßami…¨~…ģ, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1944 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Md. Abdul Hamid , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bangladesh anini i ci Md. Abdul Hamid, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 24 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i m…¨~…ģ. ab~b~v…¨~…ģo~u~u…ĺ ńßami…¨~…ģ , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vaŇč…ĺa…¨~…ģ…ôsńß anini i ¶i m…¨~…ģ. ab~b~v…¨~…ģo~u~u…ĺ ńßami…¨~…ģ, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
